mechanism: As energy deleveraged (0.5-1.0x vs 3-4x), it lost its canary role for HY defaults. Agricultural credit stress (delinquencies 2.5-3.5%, farmland -8-12%) may partially fill the early warning gap, though too small (~$560B) for macro significance.
regime_dependence: Energy canary obsolescence is structural (post-2015 deleveraging). Agricultural leading indicator quality is untested across multiple cycles.
